title: hieracium bifidum subsp. adhalsicum
intro: Hieracium bifidum subsp. adhalsicum, also known as the hawkweed or Hieracium, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the dandelion family, Asteraceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating skin conditions, wounds, and gastrointestinal issues due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Hieracium bifidum subsp. adhalsicum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are typically used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
